description: Implement the complete favorites feature: a FavoritesContext for managing favorites state with localStorage persistence, a FavoriteButton component on each track, a dedicated /favorites page with empty state, and a navigation link to favorites from the header.
steps: Create lib/favorites.ts with helper functions for localStorage operations: getFavorites(): ItunesTrack[], addFavorite(track: ItunesTrack): void, removeFavorite(trackId: number): void, isFavorite(trackId: number): boolean. Use a localStorage key like 'music-search-favorites'. Prevent duplicates by checking trackId before adding.

Create app/components/FavoritesContext.tsx as a 'use client' context provider (following the AudioPlayerContext.tsx pattern). It should: load favorites from localStorage on mount, expose favorites array, addFavorite, removeFavorite, and isFavorite functions. Use useState + useEffect for hydration-safe localStorage reads. Wrap the state updates to also persist to localStorage.
Wrap the app with FavoritesProvider in app/layout.tsx, nesting it inside AudioPlayerProvider (or alongside it).

Create app/components/FavoriteButton.tsx as a 'use client' component that renders a heart icon button. It should accept an ItunesTrack prop, use useFavorites() hook to check if track is favorited, and toggle on click. Filled heart when favorited, outlined heart when not. Style with Tailwind: text-red-500 when active, text-muted when inactive, with hover states and transition. Include proper aria-label ('Add to favorites' / 'Remove from favorites').

Modify app/components/TrackCard.tsx to include the FavoriteButton. Since TrackCard is currently a server component (no 'use client'), either: (a) make TrackCard a client component, or (b) create a wrapper that keeps the card as a Link but overlays the FavoriteButton with an onClick stopPropagation to prevent navigation. The FavoriteButton should appear in the top-right corner of the artwork area, shown on hover or when favorited. Use absolute positioning within the relative artwork container.

Add a 'Favorites' navigation link to the header in app/page.tsx (in the nav element next to the h1). Style it as a link with a heart icon. Also add the same nav link in app/track/[id]/page.tsx header.

Create app/favorites/page.tsx as a client component page that: reads favorites from useFavorites() context, displays them using TrackGrid (reusing the existing grid), and shows an empty state when no favorites exist. The empty state should have a heart icon, heading 'No favorites yet', and a message encouraging users to search for music and add favorites. Include a link back to search.
Ensure all new components use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML with proper aria attributes.
acceptance_criteria: A heart-shaped favorite button appears on each TrackCard (visible on hover or when the track is favorited)
Clicking the favorite button adds the track to favorites (heart fills/turns red)
Clicking a filled favorite button removes the track from favorites
Navigating to /favorites shows all favorited tracks in a grid
The /favorites page shows an appropriate empty state when no favorites exist
Favorites persist across page refreshes (stored in localStorage)
Duplicate favorites are prevented (adding the same track twice does not create duplicates)
A navigation link to /favorites is visible in the site header
